data: Portable Stable Selfie Stick Tripod with Fill Light

Capture every precious moment effortlessly with our Portable Stable Selfie Stick Tripod with Fill Light—a must-have mobile accessory for travelers, vloggers, and life documenters. This versatile tool combines a secure phone holder, stable tripod base, and built-in fill light, ensuring perfect shots in any lighting for birthdays, Christmas, or travel adventures. Crafted from durable plastic, it’s lightweight yet sturdy, folding compactly to fit in your bag for on-the-go use. Compatible with iPhones, Android devices, and small cameras like GoPros, it features Bluetooth remote control for easy hands-free operation—ideal for group photos, solo vlogs, or facetime calls. Whether capturing selfies, recording videos, or taking steady shots, this tripod offers the stability and functionality you need. Perfect for promotions, wholesale, or personalized gifts, it can be branded with custom logos. Sustainable, stylish, and designed for everyday use, it’s your ultimate photography companion.

Whether as a daily accessory, a gift for birthdays, anniversaries, or holidays, or a promotional item for wholesale branding, its trendy, versatile design complements any outfit – from casual to chic. Portable 12V Auto Battery Car Jump Starter with Flashlight

Discover our Portable 12V Auto Battery Car Jump Starter with Flashlight, a compact and compatible jump-start aid power bank, must-have for any car owner. Compatible with cars, trucks, motorcycles, snowmobiles, boats, and more, designed for reliability. Provides stable current for 12V vehicles even in extreme temperatures from -4°F to 140°F. Functions as a 4800mAh power bank to charge smartphones, tablets, and other USB devices. Equipped with a multi-function LED flashlight with 3 modes: illumination, flash, and SOS. Ideal for daily use, travel, outdoor activities like camping and fishing, enhancing emergency preparedness and on-the-go charging. Made with ABS material, ensuring durability. Suitable for Anniversary, Travel, Holidays, Camping, Fishing occasions. Rush service available; contact for larger capacity options.
